topics.topic: Solving the Read-After-Write Consistency Problem in Laravel with Replicas
topics.context: scaling reads with database replicas in production while avoiding stale data UI glitches
topics.notes: include sticky sessions, manual connection switching, and trade-offs of eventually consistent reads

topics.topic: Implementing Distributed Locking for Multi-Server Laravel Workers
topics.context: preventing race conditions when multiple horizontal application servers run overlapping scheduled tasks
topics.notes: include Redis-based AtomLock, lock expiration pitfalls, and handling stale lock cleanup

topics.topic: Building Zero-Downtime Data Migrations with the Expand-Contract Pattern
topics.context: deploying schema changes to high-traffic tables without locking or breaking the live app
topics.notes: include 3-phase migrations (expand, sync, contract), background worker data filling, and rollback safety

topics.topic: Architecting High-Performance API Observability with Structured Logging
topics.context: debugging production failures in distributed Laravel systems using Correlation IDs and Context
topics.notes: include Logstage/Monolog customization, tracing request lifecycles across queues, and integrating with Datadog/ELK

topics.topic: Hardening Laravel Webhook Consumers Against Distributed Denial of Service
topics.context: processing massive spikes in payment/event webhooks without overwhelming DB connections
topics.notes: include rapid signature verification, queue-first processing, idempotent handlers, and dynamic rate limiting
